primarySourceLabel: Scoped section: B.S. in Chemistry (general option) requirements major requirements
sourceLabel: Scoped section: B.S. in Chemistry (general option) requirements major requirements
requirementCueLines: B CHEM 237 Organic Chemistry I (4 credits)
B CHEM 238/241 Organic Chemistry II w/ Lab (4+3 credits)
B CHEM 239/242 Organic Chemistry III w/ Lab (4+3 credits)
Minimum 2.0 grade is required in each one of the above chemistry courses.
Choose one of the following three-course series options:
Option 1
B PHYS 121 Mechanics (5 credits)
B PHYS 122 Electromagnetism and Oscillatory Motion (5 credits)
B PHYS 123 Waves (5 credits)
Option 2
B PHYS 114/117 General Physics w/ Lab (4+1 credits)
B PHYS 115/118 General Physics w/ Lab (4+1 credits)
B PHYS 116/119 General Physics w/ Lab (4+1 credits)
Any ONE of the following courses to be selected:
STMATH 207 Introduction to Differential Equations (5 credits)
STMATH 208 Matrix Algebra with Applications (5 credits)
STMATH 224 Multivariable Calculus (5 credits)
STMATH 341 Introduction to Statistical Inference (5 credits)
B CHEM 294 Chemistry Seminar (1-2 credits)
B CHEM 312 Inorganic Chemistry I (3 credits)
B CHEM 316 Quantitative Chemical Analysis and Equilibrium Chemistry (4 credits)
B CHEM 317 Quantitative Environmental Analysis Lab (3 credits)
B CHEM 401 Physical Chemistry I (4 credits)
B CHEM 402 Physical Chemistry II (4 credits)
B CHEM 495 Investigative Chemistry I (3 credits)
B CHEM 497 Apprenticeship in Chemistry Education (1–3 credits, maximum 6)
Complete seven credits from any of the following courses, including at least one lab.
B CHEM 310 Molecular Modeling (5 credits)
B CHEM 313 Inorganic Chemistry II (3 credits)
B CHEM 350 Atmospheric Chemistry and Air Pollution (5 credits)
B BIO 364 / B CHEM 364 Biochemistry I (5 credits)
B BIO 365 / B CHEM 365 Biochemistry II (5 credits)
B BIO 366 / B CHEM 366 Biochemistry Lab (3 credits)
B BIO 375 / B CHEM 375 Molecular Biology (5 credits)
B CHEM 404 Physical Chemistry Lab (4 credits)
B CHEM 426 Instrumental Analysis (5 credits)
B CHEM 493 Advanced Topics in Chemistry (1–5 credits, maximum 15)
B CHEM 494 Special Topics in Biochemistry (3 credits, maximum 12)
Approved Independent Study in Chemistry (B CHEM 498) (1–5 credits, maximum 10)
Approved Undergraduate Research in Chemistry (B CHEM 499) (1–5 credits, maximum 10)
Additional courses: As needed to fulfill the University General Education Requirements
